subject: Add TLS and DMaap config
commit_message:
Add TLS and DMaap config

Also fix postgres service in dashboard configuration.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1701
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1694
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1695
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I02cc7e3cecb0a15661f05a7dce91a0d0f48ba0c7

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

The changes have been tested but full verification (showing all of DCAE coming up cleanly) isn't possible due to problem with dashboard.  (See DCAEGEN2-1701.)

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained CI build failure on some jobs.
Jobs with issue:
- Step: apps_deploy 
  * Project: oom 
  * Status: failed 
  * Pipeline: 'https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//pipelines/74410587' 
  * API pipeline url: 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/6550110/pipelines/74410587' 
  * Failed jobs: 
  *   - id: 264802304 
  *     name: clean/clean 
  *     status: failed 
  *     duration: 90.8174 
  *     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/264802304 
  *   - id: 264803552 
  *     name: clean/clean 
  *     status: failed 
  *     duration: 92.458548 
  *     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/264803552

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

TEST RESULTS FOR OOM/DCAE (staging branch)
2019-08-02
Partial deployment of ONAP (aaf, cassandra, consul, dcaegen2, dmaap, log, msb, policy, robot, sdc)

NOTE: The DCAE service change handler does not get past the init stage due to
problems with SDC (cassandra and be configuration jobs failing).  This causes the
DCAE healthcheck to fail.  All other DCAE components are successfully deployed.
